onboarding.hero_subtitle: Count, add, explore & grow your candy castle!
onboarding.swipe_hint: Swipe the card to see more surprises!

cta.start_subtitle: Enter the home castle and begin

1.title: Build Your Dream Kingdom
1.description: Solve cute math missions, win coins, and unlock castle parts one by one.

2.title: Math Made Fun
2.description: Count, trace, and listen through playful lessons made for little learners.

3.title: Collect Bright Rewards
3.description: Earn stars, celebrate small wins, and show everyone your growing math kingdom.

home.hero_subtitle: Count, add, explore & grow your candy castle!
home.start_learning_subtitle: All math adventures in one place
home.choose_quest_subtitle: Pick a mini adventure and keep the fun going!

sequencing.label: Sequencing
sequencing.description: Put numbers in the right order

learn_numbers.subtitle: Wake up the number bear and hear today's counting words.

count_objects.title: Count Objects
count_objects.subtitle: Count the picture friends and tap the right answer.

find_number.subtitle: Listen carefully and pick the magical number you hear.

match_numbers.title: Match Numbers
match_numbers.subtitle: Match the number to the right object group.

mini_quiz.title: Mini Quiz
mini_quiz.subtitle: Take on a mixed brain challenge and keep your streak glowing.

addition.title: Addition
addition.subtitle: Combine two groups and fill the bowl with the answer.

sequencing.subtitle: Complete today's missing number trail in the right order.

patterns.title: Patterns
patterns.subtitle: Spot the repeating shape pattern and finish it.

error.title: Oops! Home needs a quick retry.
error.subtitle: Tap below and we will load your learning cards again.

daily.reward_added_today: +{stars} stars have been added to today's adventure.
daily.challenge_bonus_today: You cleared today's challenge and unlocked the bonus.
daily.challenge_bonus_named: You cleared {title} and unlocked the daily bonus.
daily.goal_complete_keep_going: You reached today's goal. Keep the magic going!
daily.challenge_complete_keep_going: You cleared {title}. Keep the magic going!

settings.title: Settings
settings.hero_title: Tune the app before your child starts playing.
settings.hero_subtitle: This first version focuses on working controls you can use right now. We can add language next in the same place.
settings.language_subtitle: Switch app language using JSON-based translations. New language files appear here automatically.
settings.active_child_subtitle: Choose which child profile should continue the next learning session.
settings.audio_subtitle: These switches work across the app for music, sound effects, and spoken prompts.
settings.preview_subtitle: Try the current sound settings or quickly return to defaults.
settings.coming_next_subtitle: Language and voice selection can plug into this screen next without changing the layout.
settings.music_subtitle: Background tracks on home and learning screens
settings.sfx_subtitle: Correct, wrong, and reward feedback sounds
settings.voice_preview_message: Hello grown ups. Math Kingdom is ready for today's adventure.
settings.coming_next_body: Language selector, voice accent choices, and spoken instruction options can be added here next.
settings.parent_controls_subtitle: These tools are available because you opened settings from the parent dashboard.
settings.parent_pin_update_hint: Update the 4-digit PIN used to open the parent dashboard.
settings.parent_pin_create_hint: Create a 4-digit PIN for parent-only controls.
settings.parent_pin_invalid: Please enter exactly 4 digits for the parent PIN.

parent_dashboard.title: Parent Dashboard
parent_dashboard.set_pin_subtitle: Create a 4-digit PIN so only grown-ups can open this area.
parent_dashboard.zone_subtitle: Enter your parent PIN to view learning progress.
parent_dashboard.pin_did_not_match: That PIN did not match. Try again.
parent_dashboard.child_profile_subtitle: Choose which child is active for the next learning session.
parent_dashboard.audio_subtitle: These controls apply to music, sound effects, and spoken prompts.
parent_dashboard.summary_subtitle: A quick adult-friendly snapshot of today and the current streak.
parent_dashboard.activity_levels_subtitle: No scores, only gentle progress labels for young learners.
parent_dashboard.summary_body: This week's focus: keep the {streak} alive, celebrate {today} adventures today, and build on {stars} stars earned so far.

learning.finish_every_challenge: You finished every challenge. Keep going with the next adventure!
learning.speaker: Hear again

learning.match_prompt: Match the number to the picture group.
learning.find_prompt: Listen and tap the correct number.
learning.sequencing_prompt: Put the missing number in the right place.
learning.division_speak_prompt: {total} divided by {groups} equals what? Share the objects into equal groups.
learning.unlocked_message: You earned enough stars to unlock this new learning adventure.
learning.stars_needed: You need {count} more stars to unlock this adventure.
learning.choose_learner_subtitle: Pick who is playing right now.
learning.welcome_back_message: Let's collect more stars and unlock new adventures today.
learning.choose_activity: Choose a fun activity and become a Math Hero!
learning.daily_goal_done: Daily goal complete. Amazing work today!
learning.daily_goal_remaining: {count} more adventure to finish today's goal
learning.daily_goal_remaining_other: {count} more adventures to finish today's goal
learning.tap_activity_hint: Tap any activity to start your magical learning journey!
learning.more_adventures_subtitle: Patterns, sequencing, and operation quests from the home map.
learning.try_again_hear: Try again. Tap the speaker if you want to hear it again.
learning.trace_prompt: Trace the number with your finger.
learning.learn_swipe_hint: Swipe or tap numbers to explore.
learning.sequencing_drag_hint: Drag the missing number into the gap.
learning.patterns_drag_hint: Drag the shape to complete the pattern.
learning.addition_drag_hint: Drag or tap every object into the bowl.
learning.multiplication_drag_hint: Build equal groups by dragging objects.
learning.need_help_move_all: Need help? Tap to move all
learning.quiz_drag_card_hint: Hold a number card and drag it into the glowing box.
learning.fill_missing_in_order: Fill the missing number in order.
learning.count_backward_fill_gap: Count backward and fill the gap.
learning.trace_follow_path: Lovely! Keep following the dotted path.
learning.trace_try_again_stroke: Nice try. Let's start that stroke again.
learning.trace_start_from_dot: Start from the green dot to trace {word}.
learning.trace_ghost_hint: Ghost hint is showing this stroke path. Trace over the glowing line.
learning.trace_ghost_helper_on: Ghost helper line is on now.

math_operations.title: Math Ops

math_operations.all_progress: All four operations have progress. Amazing work!
math_operations.next_milestone: Next milestone: complete {current} of {total} operation adventures.
math_operations.intro: Addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division in one place.

kingdom.title: My Kingdom
kingdom.subtitle: Every quest adds something magical to this map.
kingdom.new_place_message: Your learning adventures opened a magical new place on the map.
kingdom.zone_locked_clouds: This area is still hidden behind kingdom clouds.
kingdom.unlock_grow_zones: Unlock this place by growing earlier zones.

garden.title: Number Garden
garden.subtitle: Flowers bloom when number lessons are done.
garden.hint: Practice number recognition to grow brighter flowers.

meadow.title: Counting Meadow
meadow.subtitle: Animals gather here after counting adventures.
meadow.hint: Count objects to invite more meadow friends.

castle.title: Shape Castle
castle.subtitle: Trace carefully and the castle rises stone by stone.
castle.hint: Tracing numbers builds stronger walls and towers.

path.title: Pattern Pathway
path.subtitle: Pattern quests add shining tiles to the walkway.
path.hint: Complete pattern adventures to decorate the path.

bridge.title: Math Bridge
bridge.subtitle: Add and take away to grow bridge stones.

stairs.title: Sequence Stairs
stairs.subtitle: Sequencing adventures raise the glowing steps here.
stairs.hint: Put numbers in order to climb higher.

sticker-sun.title: Sunny Star
sticker-sun.subtitle: Happy morning sticker
sticker-sun.description: A bright golden sticker for cheerful learning days.

sticker-rainbow.title: Rainbow Pop
sticker-rainbow.subtitle: Color splash sticker
sticker-rainbow.description: Unlocked after a few wins to decorate your collection.

sticker-balloon.title: Balloon Buddy
sticker-balloon.subtitle: Floating fun sticker
sticker-balloon.description: A party balloon sticker for steady practice.

sticker-crown.title: Mini Crown
sticker-crown.subtitle: Royal sticker reward
sticker-crown.description: A royal crown for children who keep showing up.

badge-counter.title: Counting Champ
badge-counter.subtitle: Badge for number confidence
badge-counter.description: Celebrate strong counting progress with this mint badge.

badge-tracer.title: Tracing Pro
badge-tracer.subtitle: Badge for careful writing
badge-tracer.description: Awarded to learners who trace with patience.

badge-matcher.title: Matching Master
badge-matcher.subtitle: Badge for quick thinking
badge-matcher.description: A smart badge for strong visual matching.

badge-quiz.title: Quiz Wizard
badge-quiz.subtitle: Badge for mixed challenges
badge-quiz.description: A shiny badge for handling tap, drag, and write tasks.

trophy-bronze.title: Bronze Castle Cup
trophy-bronze.subtitle: First kingdom trophy
trophy-bronze.description: A small but proud trophy for early milestones.

trophy-silver.title: Silver Moon Cup
trophy-silver.subtitle: Middle milestone trophy
trophy-silver.description: A silver reward for consistent learning sessions.

trophy-gold.title: Golden Kingdom Cup
trophy-gold.subtitle: Big celebration trophy
trophy-gold.description: A golden cup for building a strong math kingdom.

trophy-royal.title: Royal Hero Crown
trophy-royal.subtitle: Top collection reward
trophy-royal.description: The grand reward for children who finish many adventures.

trace_strokes.slide_down: Start at the top and slide down.
trace_strokes.curve_top_swoop: Curve across the top, then swoop down and slide right.
trace_strokes.roof_line: Draw the roof line across the middle.
trace_strokes.standing_line: Now trace the tall standing line.
trace_strokes.across_tummy: Go across, down, and around the tummy.
trace_strokes.loop_tuck: Loop around and tuck into the middle.
trace_strokes.slide_slant: Slide across the top, then slant down.

pattern_prompts.ab_turns: The pieces take turns. Which one comes next?
pattern_prompts.abb_two_same: One piece, then two the same. What comes next?
pattern_prompts.abb_group_three: Watch the group of three and complete it.
